content:
All three sprints are created and ready to execute:

- **Sprint 6** — React Flow visual editor with 4 custom node types, inspector panel, schema serialization, and save/load
- **Sprint 7** — SQLite database with the 5-table schema plus /workflows and /runs REST endpoints
- **Sprint 8** — Schema-driven orchestrator engine with inputMapping resolution, agent node execution, and human_gate approval flow

Want me to kick off Sprint 6 now?
Waiting for the user to respond.

Starting sprint execution: Sprint 8: Workflow Orchestrator Engine
Executing 5 task(s)...
Coder — rate limited, retrying...

All 4 Phase 1 sprints are created and ready to execute:

- **Sprint 6** — Database & API Foundation
- **Sprint 7** — React Flow Visual Workflow Editor
- **Sprint 8** — Workflow Orchestrator Engine
- **Sprint 9** — Run History & Monitoring UI

They need to run in order (6 → 7 → 8 → 9) since the editor depends on the API, and the monitoring UI depends on the run data model. Want me to kick off Sprint 6 now?
Waiting for your go-ahead to kick off Sprint 6. Just say the word and I'll start executing.
Coder — rate limited, retrying...
Starting Sprint 8: Workflow Orchestrator Engine — exploring current codebase state first.
Dependencies installed. Building foundation (types, DB schema, validators) then implementing all 5 tasks.
All 5 tasks implemented. Server restarted with zero TS errors. Running API integration tests now.
Sprint 8 complete! All 5 tasks passed. Full end-to-end workflow run verified: input→agent→finalize with audit trail, error handling, and fire-and-forget API.
Coder — rate limited, retrying...

Task 1 complete — React Flow canvas with 4 draggable node types, color-coded borders, and palette all working. Moving to Task 2 verification.
Task 2 complete — Inspector panel with per-type editors (Input fields, Agent instructions/effort/timeout, Human Gate channel/decisions, Finalize read-only) all working. Moving to Task 3 validation.
Task 3 complete — Serialization with position persistence and client-side validator with real-time error banner all working. Moving to Task 4 (Save/Load API wiring).
Sprint 6: React Flow Visual Workflow Editor finished.
Waiting for code review of Sprint 6: React Flow Visual Workflow Editor...
Sprint 6 complete! All 4 tasks done — React Flow visual workflow editor with drag-and-drop nodes, inspector panel, validation, and Save/Load API integration all working end-to-end.

Starting Sprint 6 execution — reading existing codebase first, then implementing Prisma migration, API routes, validator, and middleware.

Task 1 complete — Prisma installed, schema with 5 models (Workflow, WorkflowRun, RunStep, RunEvent, Approval) created, migration applied, persistence rewritten to async. Moving to Task 4 (schema validator).

Task 4 complete — strict schema validator with all rules (schemaVersion='1.0', flowId, exactly one finalize, agent config.instructions, from/to + legacy source/target edges). Moving to Task 2 (workflow routes).
All 5 tasks complete — running final end-to-end verification and browser check now.
Sprint 6: Database & API Foundation finished.

Sprint 6 complete! All 5 tasks passed — Prisma DB with 5 models, /workflows and /runs REST endpoints, strict schema validator, error middleware with CORS and logging. Frontend renders with no errors.

Task 3 complete — GET /runs now includes workflowName. All 28 smoke tests pass (17 workflow + 11 runs). Sprint finishing up.
